sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113430" key="xarmo/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρμόφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n113430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heart-delighting,</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of joyous heart,</tr_> epith. of Hermes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">127</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
